title: Implement scoped git enforcement hook (PreToolUse)
description: Implement a PreToolUse hook that blocks dangerous git commands: `git add .`, `git add -A`, `git add --all`, wildcard staging, and `git push --force`. Replaces the instruction-based "PROHIBITED: git add ." rule with deterministic enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: Given a terminal command contains `git add .`, `git add -A`, or `git add --all`, when PreToolUse fires, then it returns `permissionDecision: "deny"` with reason
Given a terminal command contains `git add specific-file.ts`, when PreToolUse fires, then it allows
Given a terminal command contains `git push --force`, when PreToolUse fires, then it returns `permissionDecision: "ask"` requiring manual approval
